title: PEP and +more Win your Dream Competition

summary: Spend R100 or more at PEP, PEP HOME or PEP CELL, scan your +more rewards card and use the SMS or email game link for a chance to win weekly R100,000 cash prizes and instant PEP vouchers.

Scan your +more rewards card at checkout. Only one qualifying scan per customer per day counts.
Open the one-time game link received by SMS or email and enter your details and dream for the weekly cash draw.
Play the game for a chance at instant voucher prizes before the 20 June 2026 closing date.
